# Elevia Enterprises

> Elevia Enterprises is a purpose-driven holding company building ventures that create opportunity, inspire growth, and create lasting impact through entrepreneurship, innovation, and purpose-driven leadership. "Built to Inspire. Designed to Uplift."

Elevia Enterprises operates according to a set of seven guiding principles ("The North Star"). Its current operating venture is Elevia Stays, a housing company developing insurance relocation housing, corporate housing, and furnished extended-stay rentals. Other growth areas under the Elevia umbrella include Elevia Capital, Elevia Ventures, Elevia Studios, and Elevated Escapes Foundation (a 501(c)(3)).

## Pages

- [Home](https://eleviaenterprises.com/): Vision, values, ventures, and current focus
- [Our Vision](https://eleviaenterprises.com/#about): Mission and purpose
- [The North Star](https://eleviaenterprises.com/#values): Seven guiding principles
- [Growth Areas](https://eleviaenterprises.com/#ventures): Elevia Stays, Elevia Capital, Elevia Ventures, Elevia Studios, Elevated Escapes Foundation
- [Current Focus](https://eleviaenterprises.com/#current-focus): Elevia Stays
- [Contact](https://eleviaenterprises.com/#contact): Get in touch with Elevia Enterprises

## Related

- [Elevia Stays](https://eleviastays.com/): Furnished housing and insurance relocation venture
